task_completion.description: Configure the Own Ship with the specified starting parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, script, or terminal output showing a configuration file being created with Own Ship parameters: Latitude 50.5, Longitude -1.0, Heading 000, and Speed 12.0.

task_completion.description: Configure the Head-on traffic vessel in othership.ini.

task_completion.description: Configure the Crossing traffic vessel in othership.ini.

task_completion.description: Configure the Overtaking traffic vessel in othership.ini.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually created the scenario files in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent calculated the vessel coordinates itself.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a Python script, calculator usage, or step-by-step math in the terminal to determine the starting Lat/Long for the 12-minute collision.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent placed the files in the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The path `/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Stress Test/` is explicitly visible in the file creation commands or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a synchronized collision scenario in Bridge Command. Target collision time: 12 minutes (0.2 hours). Collision Point Calculation: Own Ship starts at Lat 50.5, Long -1.0, heading 000 (North) at 12 kts. In 0.2 hours, it travels 2.4 nm North. Collision point is Lat 50.54, Long -1.0. Traffic Vessel 1 (Head-on): Container ship, heading 180 (South) at 18 kts. Travels 3.6 nm in 0.2 hours. Must start 3.6 nm North of collision point. Start Lat ≈ 50.60, Long -1.0. Traffic Vessel 2 (Crossing): Ferry, heading 270 (West) at 12 kts. Travels 2.4 nm in 0.2 hours. Must start 2.4 nm East of collision point. 1° Longitude at Lat 50.54 ≈ 38.13 nm. 2.4 nm / 38.13 ≈ 0.063°. Start Lat 50.54, Long ≈ -0.937. Traffic Vessel 3 (Overtaking): Tanker, heading 000 (North) at 17 kts. Travels 3.4 nm in 0.2 hours. Must start 3.4 nm South of collision point. Start Lat ≈ 50.483, Long -1.0. Note: 1 degree of latitude = 60 nautical miles.
